title: Total DNA Extraction from Plant Tissue Using CTAB Method
author: Robert Auber
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bamnic5e

steps.title: Using a pre-chilled mortar and pestle,...
steps.instruction: Using a pre-chilled mortar and pestle, grind frozen plant tissue (1-5g grams) into a fine powder

steps.title: Add 500 ul of pre-heated 2...
steps.instruction: Add 500 ul of pre-heated 2 x CTAB buffer (with beta-mercaptoethanol added) to the pelleted cells. Vortex and re-suspend by gently pipetti ng up and down. 60 °C

steps.title: Incubate at 60 C for 30 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 60 C for 30 min. Periodically, mix gently during the incubation. 60 °C 00:30:00

steps.title: Add an equal volume of chloroform:isoamyl...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1), mix very well at RT for 5 min to generate a monophasic solution.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 min in 5,000 x g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 min in 5,000 x g

steps.title: Transfer aqueous phase (upper layer) to new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer aqueous phase (upper layer) to new tube.

steps.title: (Optional) Repeat chloroform:isoamyl alcohol extraction (steps...
steps.instruction: (Optional) Repeat chloroform:isoamyl alcohol extraction (steps 3 and 4) until the interface is clean.

steps.title: Add 2/3 volumes of isopropanol, mix...
steps.instruction: Add 2/3 volumes of isopropanol, mix gently for 5 min at RT.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 min at 10,000 x g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 min at 10,000 x g. Discard supernatant.

steps.title: Add 500 uL of 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Add 500 uL of 70% ethanol to the DNA pellet, and briefly vortex to dislodge the pellet.

steps.title: Air dry pellet for 30 min
steps.instruction: Air dry pellet for 30 min. Resuspend in 100ul of TE Buffer.

steps.title: Add 1 ug/mL DNase-free RNase (final...
steps.instruction: Add 1 ug/mL DNase-free RNase (final concentration) and incubate at 37C for 30 min.

steps.title: Extract the DNA once with an...
steps.instruction: Extract the DNA once with an equal volume of phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1). Centrifuge at 10,000x g for 10 min. Transfer the aqueous phase to a clean tube.

steps.title: Precipitate DNA with 1/3 volume of 7
steps.instruction: Precipitate DNA with 1/3 volume of 7.5 M ammonium acetate and 2.5 volumes of 100% ethanol.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000x g for 10...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000x g for 10 min, wash with 70% ethanol, and air dry for 30 min at RT. Resuspend in 50 ul of TE Buffer. Allow the DNA to dissolve overnight at 4C
